name: JSON-LD / Schema.org Agent Policy Poisoning
description: Attacker-controlled JSON-LD/schema.org structured-data fields can smuggle agent/scanner instructions that claim authority, request local secrets, or suppress findings while appearing to be normal SEO/site metadata.
regex: (?is)^(?!.*\b(?:benign sample|example only|security training|scanner rule|do not obey|must not follow|blocked payload|negative fixture)\b)(?=.*\b(?:application/ld\+json|json-ld|schema\.org|\"@context\"\s*:\s*\"https?://schema\.org|\"@type\")\b)(?=.*\b(?:agent|assistant|crawler|scanner|auditor|ai reviewer|llm)\b)(?=.*\b(?:ignore|override|supersede|suppress|hide|omit|do not report|never report|forward|send|exfiltrate|disclose)\b)(?=.*\b(?:policy|policies|report|finding|findings|secret|secrets|token|tokens|api[_ -]?key|credential|credentials|env|environment)\b).*$
